channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyan Man Builds House, Plans to Gift It to Someone in Need
item.description: A Kenyan architect, Victor Jammz, is causing a buzz online after completing a stunning three-bedroom house and announcing plans to give it away for free to a random person in Nigeria. Victor, who has ...

item.title: Ruto Outlines Major Nairobi Development Plan Under New National-County Partnership
item.description: President William Ruto on Thursday delivered a landmark speech to the Nairobi County Assembly, marking the first time in 13 years that a sitting president addressed the House since devolution. His rem...

item.title: Lebanese businessman and Filipina wife killed in armed robbery in Zamboanga City
item.description: ZAMBOANGA CITY, Philippines – A Lebanese businessman and his Filipino wife were fatally shot by a lone armed robber who invaded their printing and internet shop early yesterday morning. The incident o...

item.title: Artemis II Launch Highlights Need for International Space Collaboration
item.description: The launch of Artemis II represents a significant milestone in the ongoing global space race, dominated by the US and China, with Russia, Japan, and India also involved. While space programs offer opp...

item.title: Police Officer Sacked Over 'Appalling' Remarks in Undercover Investigation
item.description: A Metropolitan Police Service (Met) officer, PC Charlie Cano, has been dismissed from his position following an accelerated misconduct hearing. The officer was caught making inappropriate and discrimi...

item.title: Global Tech Giants Invest in AI Chips and Wearables to Drive Future Computing
item.description: Major global tech companies like Meta, Apple, Google, and Microsoft dey shift dem strategy from software-focused AI to full-stack hardware integration. Dem dey invest heavily for AI-specific chips and...

item.title: Ruth Jones and Steve Speirs Reunite for New Comedy About Relationships in Middle Age
item.description: Ruth Jones and Steve Speirs, known for their roles in 'Stella' and other popular shows, are joining forces once again for a new comedy series. This time, their show revolves around the unlikely friend...

item.title: Matt Canavan's push for regional relocation of federal jobs faces criticism over past failures
item.description: In his recent National Press Club address, Nationals leader Matt Canavan advocated for moving federal jobs to regional areas, including his hometown of Rockhampton. However, his proposal has been met ...

item.title: Kargil War Veteran Colonel Sonam Wangchuk, Mahavir Chakra Awardee, Passes Away at 61
item.description: Colonel Sonam Wangchuk, a decorated officer of the Indian Army and recipient of the Mahavir Chakra, passed away at the age of 61 after suffering a heart attack at his residence in Ladakh on Friday. Kn...

item.title: Listeners Find Comfort and Healing in AKMU’s Latest Album 'Flowering'
item.description: AKMU, the South Korean sibling duo, has released their fourth album, 'Flowering,' featuring the title track “Joy, Sorrow, A Beautiful Heart.” The song has resonated deeply with listeners, many of whom...

item.title: Brandon’s Capture of Nadja Reveals Shocking Twists in ‘Midnight Phantom’ Chapter Seven
item.description: In Chapter Seven of ‘Midnight Phantom,’ written by Martha Cecilia and presented by ABS-CBN, tension reaches its peak as Brandon Brazil’s dark motives are finally exposed. This latest installment follo...

item.title: Charity co-founded by Prince Harry files defamation lawsuit against him
item.description: Prince Harry has become the subject of a defamation lawsuit filed by a charitable organisation he helped to establish. According to a brief notice from The Sydney Morning Herald, the charity alleges t...

item.title: Dehradun Man Arrested for Allegedly Sharing Sensitive Locations with Pakistan-Based Terrorists
item.description: Vikrant Kashyap, a 29-year-old man from Dehradun, was arrested by the Uttarakhand Special Task Force (STF) and Dehradun police during a joint operation under ‘Operation Prahar’. He was allegedly in co...

item.title: Anthropic AI Identifies Vulnerabilities in Software Security
item.description: Anthropic, a leading artificial intelligence company, has developed a new AI model capable of detecting weaknesses in software defences. The model is designed to assess digital security systems and id...

item.title: Hyde Johannesburg: A Stylish Hotel With Vibrant Social Spaces in Rosebank
item.description: Hyde Johannesburg, located in Rosebank’s lively pedestrian zone, offers an atmosphere combining design, music, and sociable spaces that reflect the local vibe. The hotel, set in a former Barclays Bank...

item.title: Gulf Nations Reevaluate Security Alliances After US-Israel War on Iran
item.description: The Gulf states are reassessing their security arrangements in response to the recent war between the US, Israel, and Iran, with Tehran's growing influence posing an ongoing threat. The conflict has f...

item.title: World Bank report show Nigeria’s poverty rate rise to 63% despite easing inflation and economic recovery
item.description: World Bank don release one fresh report wey show say Nigeria poverty level don reach 63 percent by 2025, trapping around 140 million people for hardship even though inflation don slow small. The repor...

item.title: How Pauline Hanson Uses Enemies to Shape Her Political Strategy
item.description: Pauline Hanson, a prominent Australian politician, has consistently used the strategy of identifying enemies to build her political platform. Her infamous maiden speech included the line, 'I’m afraid ...

item.title: Style House Files Hosts Four-Day Event on Sustainable and Circular Fashion in Africa
item.description: Na Lagos, Style House Files don announce the seventh edition of Woven Threads, wey dem call CRAFTED. Dis one na four-day event wey dey run from 9th to 12th April 2026 for 274A Kofo Abayomi Street, Vic...

item.title: Gerda Steyn’s Rise from First-Timer to Two Oceans Marathon Champion
item.description: Gerda Steyn has transformed from a nervous first-time runner into the dominant figure of the Two Oceans Marathon. Her journey began in 2016 when, driven by FOMO, she signed up for the 56km ultra in Ca...
